title: Bros Cooked
description:
Fun vanilla like modpack, adds bosses, ores, and MANY MANY enchants
(also you can become nearly unstoppable)
body: Its very similar to vanilla when you spawn in, but when you go mining, theres more metals than before, a buncha different alloys you can make, some more powerfull than others. And once youre late game, theres like 4 new bosses. also i kinda just gave everything the ability to be op, theres less limits on enchants, dragon drops elytra, etc.
